estimate.title: Estimate
estimate.noFixedServices: No fixed-price services defined. Add them under Products.
estimate.promoNoMatch: No applicable items on this job for that code.
estimate.readOnly: You can view this estimate. Only a manager or admin can edit pricing.
estimate.discountHint: Tip: enter a negative unit price for a discount line.

stage.title: Stages
stage.hint: Tick each stage as it’s completed. All four are required before invoicing.

booking.title: Booking
booking.unscheduled: Not yet scheduled. Leave blank if accepted but not booked.
booking.heldOnLift: Held on lift (until released, e.g. awaiting parts)
booking.clash: {{lift}} isn't available for that duration — check the diary and try another resource.
booking.couldntBook: Couldn't book: {{lift}} isn't free for that duration — check the diary and try another resource.
booking.pickStart: Pick a start date and time.
booking.needLiftAndTimes: Choose a lift, a start and an end.
booking.readOnly: Only a manager or admin can schedule a job.

notes.title: Garage notes
notes.placeholder: Internal notes about this job (parts on order, customer comments, etc.)

cancelledBanner: This job is cancelled — everything is read-only.

comeback.label: Warranty / comeback (no charge)
comeback.hint: Work redone free — the estimate lines below stay intact as the real cost. On reports the job counts as £0 revenue, dragging margin by its PARTS cost only (labour is fixed salary overhead, never charged per-job). It invoices at £0 on the warranty series — never a chargeable invoice number.
comeback.banner: Warranty / comeback — £0 revenue; margin drag = parts cost only. Invoices at £0 (warranty series), never a chargeable number.
comeback.invoiceNote: Warranty comeback — it invoices at £0 on the warranty number series. A chargeable invoice number is never used.

delete.confirmBody: Permanently delete this card, its estimate, its diary booking, and its history? This cannot be undone.
delete.invoiceBlocked: This card has an invoice and can’t be deleted — cancel it instead.

tab.locked: Complete the previous step to unlock this one.
tab.detailsMinData: Add the customer and registration first.

field.ownerFromEdge: Owner shown is the vehicle's current owner — edits apply to them.

detailsEdit.dvsaDone: Vehicle details filled from DVSA — review and save.
detailsEdit.dvsaNone: DVSA has no record for this registration.
detailsEdit.dvsaError: The DVSA lookup didn’t respond — please try again.
detailsEdit.regCollision: A vehicle with this registration already exists here. Continue anyway?
detailsEdit.regCancelled: Not saved — change the registration or confirm to continue.

photos.title: Photos
photos.locked: This stage is complete — its photos and videos are locked. To delete one, reopen the stage (the “complete — tap to reopen” button below), delete, then mark it complete again.
photos.confirmDelete: Delete this photo? It can’t be recovered.
photos.uploadError: Couldn’t upload the photo — please try again.
photos.videoSizeWarn: That video is large ({{mb}} MB) — it will still upload, but may be slow on mobile data.
photos.confirmDeleteVideo: Delete this video? It can’t be recovered.

quoteActions.title: Quote actions
quoteActions.needLine: Add at least one line before quoting.

completion.mileageHint: Odometer reading at completion — seeds future service advisories. Optional.

invoiceTab.readyToMint: All stages complete — raise the invoice.
invoiceTab.neverStarted: This job was never marked as started.
invoiceTab.stagesRemaining: To invoice, complete (or skip) these steps first: {{list}}.
invoiceTab.notYet: The invoice becomes available once the job is worked and completed.
invoiceTab.missingTitle: This invoice is missing: {{list}}. Add it now, or skip and invoice anyway.
invoiceTab.emailSent: Invoice emailed to the customer (copy to your inbox).
invoiceTab.unmarkConfirm: Unmark this payment? Nothing has been sent to the customer — the invoice quietly returns to unpaid.

startWork.hint: Intake done — mark the work as started. In-job photos record it as it happens.

audit.title: Audit trail
audit.preface: Records actions from now on. Cards worked before this feature shipped start with an empty trail.

invoice.paid_unmarked: Payment unmarked during the clearance window

card.hours_backfilled: Labour hours backfilled onto existing lines (one-off correction)
